params.name: list_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the list.

params.name: archived
params.description: Include archived tasks in the response.

params.name: include_markdown_description
params.description: Return task descriptions in Markdown format.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Starts at 0.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by.

params.name: reverse
params.description: Reverse the order of results.

params.name: subtasks
params.description: Include subtasks in the response.

params.name: statuses[]
params.description: Filter by task status.

params.name: include_closed
params.description: Include closed tasks in the response.

params.name: assignees[]
params.description: Filter by assignee user IDs.

params.name: tags[]
params.description: Filter by tag names.

params.name: due_date_gt
params.description: Filter for tasks with due date greater than this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: due_date_lt
params.description: Filter for tasks with due date less than this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: date_created_gt
params.description: Filter for tasks created after this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: date_created_lt
params.description: Filter for tasks created before this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: date_updated_gt
params.description: Filter for tasks updated after this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: date_updated_lt
params.description: Filter for tasks updated before this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: custom_fields
params.description: Filter by custom field values. Provided as a JSON array of objects.

items.docs: Retrieves all tasks within a specified list. Supports filtering, pagination, and inclusion of subtasks and closed tasks. Results can be ordered by various fields including due date, date created, and date updated.

params.name: list_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the list.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

items.docs: Creates a new task within a specified list. The task can include a name, description, assignees, tags, priority, due date, start date, time estimate, custom fields, and other attributes.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

params.name: include_subtasks
params.description: Include subtasks in the response.

params.name: include_markdown_description
params.description: Return the task description in Markdown format.

items.docs: Retrieves a single task by its ID, including all task details such as status, assignees, tags, custom fields, and subtasks.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing task. Any fields included in the request body will be updated. Fields not included will remain unchanged.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: If you want to reference a task by its custom task ID, this value must be true.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Required when custom_task_ids is set to true. The Workspace ID.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a task by its ID. This action cannot be undone.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. Starts at 0.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by.

params.name: reverse
params.description: Reverse the order of results.

params.name: subtasks
params.description: Include subtasks in the response.

params.name: statuses[]
params.description: Filter by task statuses.

params.name: include_closed
params.description: Include closed tasks.

params.name: assignees[]
params.description: Filter by assignee user IDs.

params.name: tags[]
params.description: Filter by tag names.

params.name: due_date_gt
params.description: Filter for tasks with due date after this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: due_date_lt
params.description: Filter for tasks with due date before this Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: date_created_gt

params.name: date_created_lt

params.name: date_updated_gt

params.name: space_ids[]
params.description: Filter by space IDs.

params.name: project_ids[]
params.description: Filter by folder (project) IDs.

items.docs: Retrieves tasks across an entire Workspace (team), with support for filtering by assignees, tags, statuses, due dates, and more. This endpoint searches tasks across all lists, folders, and spaces in the Workspace.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

items.docs: Retrieves how long a task has been in each status. Returns time information for every status the task has been in.

info.name: Get bulk task time in status

params.name: task_ids[]
params.description: Array of task IDs to retrieve time in status data for.

items.docs: Retrieves time in status data for multiple tasks at once. Accepts an array of task IDs as query parameters.

params.name: list_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the list.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

items.docs: Retrieves the members (assignees and watchers) of a specific task.

params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: tag_name
params.description: The name of the tag to add.

items.docs: Adds a tag to a task. If the tag does not exist in the Space, it will be created.

params.description: The unique identifier of the task.

params.name: tag_name
params.description: The name of the tag to remove.

items.docs: Removes a tag from a task.
